column3: Body (HTML)

BPC-157 is a synthetic 15-amino acid pentadecapeptide derived from a partial sequence of human gastric juice.

This product is intended for laboratory research use only.
column35: BPC-157 Body Protection Compound bottle and packaging on a light gray background
column40: Store refrigerated at 36-46 degrees F (2-8 degrees C). Protect from light.

column3:
The Wolverine blend is a paired peptide formulation of BPC-157 (10 mg) and TB-500 (10 mg). 

This product is intended for research use only.

This blend pairs CJC-1295 no DAC (5mg), a short-acting GHRH analogue derived from Modified GRF (1-29), with ipamorelin (5mg) , a selective pentapeptide agonist. 

This product is intended for research use only.

DSIP, or Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide, is a synthetic nonapeptide with the sequence Trp-Ala-Gly-Gly-Asp-Ala-Ser-Gly-Glu.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: DSIP product with packaging on a light gray background

column3:
Epithalon, also written as Epitalon, is a synthetic tetrapeptide with the sequence Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Epithalon bottle and packaging on a light gray background

column3:
GHK-Cu is a naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex.

This product is intended for research use only.

GLOW is a research-grade peptide blend combining GHK-Cu, BPC-157, and TB-500 in a single lyophilized formulation.

This product is intended for research use only.

GLP-3 is a first-in-class triple agonist targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors simultaneously.

This product is intended for research use only.

Glutathione is a naturally occurring tripeptide composed of glutamate, cysteine, and glycine. 

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Glutathione supplement bottle with label on a light gray background

column3:
Ipamorelin is a synthetic pentapeptide growth-hormone secretagogue and selective agonist of the ghrelin/GHS-R1a receptor. 

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Ipamorelin packaging on a light gray background

column3:
KLOW is a four-peptide research blend combining GHK-Cu (50 mg), BPC-157 (10 mg), TB-500 (10 mg), and KPV (10 mg). The formulation extends the tissue-remodeling rationale of GHK-Cu, BPC-157, and TB-500 by adding KPV, an α-MSH-derived tripeptide.

This product is intended for research use only.

KPV is the C-terminal tripeptide fragment of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH), consisting of Lys-Pro-Val.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: KPV packaging with a clear bottle on a light gray background

column3:
Melanotan I, also known as afamelanotide, is a synthetic alpha-MSH analogue containing Nle4 and D-Phe7 modifications. 

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Melanotan I packaging and vial on a white background

column3:
Melanotan II is a cyclic synthetic analogue of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH) designed for melanocortin receptor research. 

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Melanotan II packaging with a clear bottle on a light gray background

column3:
MOTS-c (Mitochondrial Open Reading Frame of the 12S rRNA-c) is a 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome.

This product is strictly for research purposes only.
column35: MOTS-C product packaging on a white background

column3:
NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a ubiquitous coenzyme found in all living cells, serving as a fundamental electron carrier in redox reactions.

This product is strictly for research purposes only.
column35: NAD+ supplement bottle and packaging on a white background

column3:
Research Water is a sterile aqueous diluent.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Research Water and packaging on a light gray background
column40: Store at controlled room temperature; protect from direct light

column3:
Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide derived from the endogenous immunopeptide tuftsin, developed at the Institute of Molecular Genetics in Russia.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Selank bottle and packaging on a light gray background

column3:
Semax is a synthetic heptapeptide analogue of the ACTH 4–10 fragment developed in Russia.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Semax bottle and packaging on a light gray background

column3:
Sermorelin is a synthetic 29-amino-acid analogue of growth-hormone-releasing hormone, commonly described as GHRH(1-29) amide.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Sermorelin vial and packaging on a light gray background

column3:
Tesamorelin is a synthetic GHRH(1-44) analogue modified with an N-terminal trans-3-hexenoyl group.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Tesamorelin packaging and bottle on a light gray background

column3:
Thymosin Alpha-1, also known as thymalfasin, is an acetylated 28-amino-acid thymic peptide.

This product is intended for research use only.
column35: Thymosin Alpha-1 supplement bottle and packaging on a light gray background
